name: QRadar
description: This app supports generic, investigative, and ingestion actions on an IBM QRadar device

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of offenses to retrieve

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of offense IDs to fetch

actions.name: List Closing Reasons
actions.description: Get a list of offense closing reasons

parameters.name: include_reserved
parameters.description: Include reserved offense closing reasons

parameters.name: include_deleted
parameters.description: Include deleted offense closing reasons

actions.name: Get Events
actions.description: Get events belonging to an offense

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to get events of

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of events to retrieve

parameters.name: fields_filter
parameters.description: Filter on event field values

parameters.name: interval_days
parameters.description: Interval days

actions.name: Get Flows
actions.description: Get flows that make up an offense for a particular IP

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IP to get all the flows of

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to get flows of

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of flows to retrieve

parameters.name: fields_filter
parameters.description: Filter in AQL format on flow field values

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to get the details of

parameters.name: tenant_id
parameters.description: Tenant ID for saving container

parameters.name: ingest_offense
parameters.description: Ingest offense into Phantom

parameters.name: operation
parameters.description: Operation to perform on the ingestion data stored in the state file
parameters.default: get last saved ingestion time data

parameters.name: datetime
parameters.description: Datetime string to be stored against the ingestion data in the state file

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID against which to store the 'datetime' parameter value

actions.name: Run Query
actions.description: Execute an ariel query on the QRadar device

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Ariel Query

actions.name: Add Listitem
actions.description: Add an item to a reference set in QRadar

parameters.name: reference_set_name
parameters.description: Name of reference set to add to

parameters.name: reference_set_value
parameters.description: Value to add to the reference set

actions.name: Close Offense
actions.description: Close an active offense, marking status=CLOSED

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to close

parameters.name: closing_reason_id
parameters.description: Reason for closing offense

actions.name: Update Offense
actions.description: Attach a note to an offense

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to attach note to

parameters.name: note_text
parameters.description: Text to put into note

actions.name: Assign User
actions.description: Assign the user to an offense

parameters.name: offense_id
parameters.description: Offense ID to assign the user to

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Name of the user

parameters.name: rule_id
parameters.description: Rule ID for which information needs to be extracted

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of rules to retrieve

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

parameters.name: container_id
parameters.description: Parameter ignored for this app

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds)

parameters.name: container_count
parameters.description: Maximum number of container records to query for

parameters.name: artifact_count
parameters.description: Parameter ignored for this app
